content_fingerprint: hugging face study warns ai evaluation costs are emerging as a critical compute bottleneck researchers from the evaleval coalition have published data showing that running large scale model evaluations now consumes compute resources at a rate that rivals training raising urgent questions about sustainability as the evaluation ecosystem scales a multi author post published on the hugging face blog on april 29 argues that ai evaluation workloads long treated as a secondary concern are now demanding enough gpu hours and infrastructure to constitute a first order compute constraint for teams opera
